name: Easy Crescent Danish Rolls
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Pillsbury quick crescent rolls (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Blend the cream cheese, sugar, and lemon juice until smooth.
3. Unroll the crescent dough into 8 rectangles; firmly press perforations together to seal (pair two triangles to form one rectangle).
4. Spread about 2 tablespoons of cream cheese mixture on each rectangle.
5. Starting at the longer side, roll up each rectangle tightly, pressing edges to seal.
6. Gently stretch each roll to approximately 10 inches long.
7. Coil each roll loosely with the seam on the inside.
8. Make a deep indentation in the center of each coiled roll.
9. Fill each indentation with about 1/2 teaspoon of preserves or jam.
10. Place rolls on an ungreased cookie sheet and bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until golden brown.
11. Blend powdered sugar, vanilla, and milk into a glaze.
12. Drizzle the glaze over the warm rolls.
